portfolio_rationale: BRK.B leads with a perfect technical sweep (all 6 indicators bullish, no bearish factors) and solid fundamentals, while the bear case is exceptionally weak. LLY offers the strongest fundamental growth story in the universe (42% revenue growth, 67% gross margin) with positive technicals, though litigious news warrants a slight discount. AAPL rounds out the core with broad fundamental strength and a weak bear case. GOOGL and AMZN are excluded due to fully bearish technical pictures that create genuine near-term downside risk despite decent fundamentals.

BRK.B.reason: Perfect technical sweep with all 6 indicators bullish, solid fundamentals, and a bear case that scored only 0.4 on case strength — highest conviction in the universe.

LLY.reason: Strongest fundamental growth story (42.5% revenue growth, 67% gross margin, 49% operating margin) with positive price momentum, partially discounted for heavy litigious news flow.

AAPL.reason: Broad fundamental strength across all profitability metrics with mostly bullish technicals; bear case rests on a trivially sub-1.0 current ratio that is immaterial given AAPL's cash generation.

XOM.reason: Strong technical momentum (5 of 6 indicators bullish) and positive news trends support a modest position, but thin fundamental quality and retail attention spike limit conviction.

GOOGL.reason: All 6 technical indicators are bearish with -7.8% 20-day return; technical headwinds are too significant despite solid fundamentals.

AMZN.reason: Bull and bear cases are essentially tied with both scoring identically, and the -13% 20-day return with 5 bearish technical indicators makes this the weakest bull conviction in the universe.
